topics.title: Ocean temperatures set June record
topics.summary: Global ocean surface temperatures outside the polar regions hit a record high for June, according to Copernicus data, raising concerns about extreme weather and marine ecosystems.
topics.discussionPrompt: The ocean can feel distant from daily life, but it shapes weather everywhere. Do record ocean temperatures make climate change feel more real?

topics.title: UN panel warns on AI risks
topics.summary: A UN-backed expert panel warned that fast-moving AI development is outpacing oversight, highlighting concerns around autonomous systems, deception, misuse and gaps in safety evidence.
topics.discussionPrompt: AI keeps getting more useful and more worrying at the same time. What kind of rules would make you feel more comfortable with it?

topics.title: Mexico reaches World Cup last 16
topics.summary: Mexico beat Ecuador 2-0 at Azteca Stadium, earning its first World Cup knockout-stage win since 1986 and sending the co-hosts into the last 16.
topics.discussionPrompt: Home crowds can change the whole mood of a match. Do you think playing at home gives teams a real edge, or just extra pressure?

topics.title: USMCA review adds trade uncertainty
topics.summary: The US is expected not to extend USMCA immediately, starting a review process that could leave the North American trade pact in long-term uncertainty.
topics.discussionPrompt: Trade deals sound dry, but they can affect jobs, prices and local businesses. How much should regular people follow negotiations like this?
